title: Rko's Afk Utils
description: this mod prevents from kicked by afk from server.
body:
### This mod is a client-side mod that prevents kiked by afk from server. I tested on Hypixel, and It did prevented to put me in to limbo. If there are a bug or if this mod doesn't work, please leave it on comment.

 

### How to use:
* go to somewhere that you want to be afk or somewhere safe.
* type "/afktoggle" on your chatting bar
* your character will start moving in 4 directions, so server can't detect that you are afk.
* after being afk, type "/afktoggle" again. It will stop moving.

 

 

 **__WARNING!!__ THIS MOD DOES NOT PREVENT BEING __KILLED__ BY SOMEONE OR ANY OTHER STUFF HAPPENS WHILE YOU ARE AFK.**
